# HR Department Onboarding Welcome to HR! 1. Review HR policies and compliance documents. 2. Meet with the HR team lead for orientation. 3. Set up access to HRIS and payroll systems. 4. Attend HR onboarding session. 5. Review benefits and employee support resources. For questions, contact your HR team lead.

--- department: HR sensitivity: internal version: 1.0 --- # Vacation Policy All full-time employees are entitled to 15 days of paid vacation per year. Requests must be submitted via the HR portal at least 2 weeks in advance.

--- department: Technology sensitivity: confidential version: 2.1 --- # Deploying New Software Build 1. Merge code to main branch. 2. Run CI/CD pipeline. 3. Notify QA for validation. 4. Deploy to production after approval.

# Technology Department Onboarding Welcome to Technology! 1. Complete your technical setup (laptop, IDE, VPN). 2. Review technology SOPs and code standards. 3. Meet your team lead and schedule onboarding sessions. 4. Access project repositories and documentation. 5. Attend Technology orientation meeting. For questions, contact your team lead or HR.
